title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank Global Group - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank Global Group - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!
